failure_reason: Moved BML support forward from focused executable .bml proof into a real companion-shaped declaration file. The new proof scans .bml source from disk, classifies BML properties, parses package/import/interface/class/section/field/string const/two-base/Main method declarations through BML/BMF rules, builds a source-originated class model, and runs Main through BMA with return value 7.
